info.title: Poveroh API
info.description: OpenAPI definition for the Poveroh v1 API

message.description: Error message describing what went wrong

error.description: Optional additional error details or context

get.description: Retrieve a list of all categories associated with the user

post.description: Create a new category with the provided data

delete.description: Delete all categories associated with the user

get.description: Retrieve a specific category by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing category with the provided data

delete.description: Delete an existing category with the provided ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all financial accounts associated with the user

post.description: Create a new financial account with the provided data

delete.description: Delete all financial accounts associated with the user

get.description: Retrieve a specific financial account by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing financial account with the provided data

delete.description: Delete an existing financial account with the provided ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all imports associated with the user

post.description: Create a new import with the provided data

delete.description: Delete all imports associated with the user

get.description: Retrieve a specific import by its ID

put.description: Update an existing import with the provided data

delete.description: Delete an existing import with the provided ID

patch.description: Mark an existing import as complete

get.description: Retrieve a trend report based on the users imports

post.description: Create a new snapshot account balance with the provided data

requestBody.description: Snapshot account balance data to create

get.description: Retrieve a list of all subcategories associated with the user

post.description: Create a new subcategory with the provided data

delete.description: Delete all subcategories associated with the user

get.description: Retrieve a specific subcategory by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing subcategory with the provided data

delete.description: Delete an existing subcategory with the provided ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all subscriptions associated with the user

post.description: Create a new subscription with the provided data

delete.description: Delete all subscriptions associated with the user

get.description: Retrieve a specific subscription by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing subscription with the provided data

delete.description: Delete an existing subscription with the provided ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all transactions associated with the user

post.description: Create a new transaction with the provided data

delete.description: Delete all transactions associated with the user

get.description: Retrieve a specific transaction by its ID

patch.description: Update an existing transaction with the provided data

delete.description: Delete an existing transaction with the provided ID

get.description: Get authenticated user information and preferences

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile. Email changes require verification and may be subject to additional security checks.
